description: Supervisor / planner agent — reads a task, picks tools from a bounded YAML-declared set, and fans out execution across per-tool Dagster assets. Ends with a synthesizer LLM that grounds the final answer in tool outputs. The 'agent of agents' pattern with full lineage.

inputs.description: Task is provided in YAML config.

outputs.description: Emits (2 + N_tools) assets: plan, one per tool, and synthesis.

synthesis_asset_name.description: Name of the final synthesis asset.

task.description: The task / question the supervisor plans against.
